name: Garden Snail
description: A large, peaceful, and very slow snail that drifts through several park zones as if nothing in the world could hurry it. It is not aggressive, but it is far tougher than its relaxed pace suggests.
behavior: It moves slowly through vegetation and open paths, barely changing the rhythm of the area. Its existence is more of a heavy obstacle than an active threat.
interactionWithPlayer: It is not aggressive, so combat almost always starts because the player wants its materials or simply wants to test how sturdy it is.
interactionWithCreatures: It tends to coexist with almost everything as long as nothing interrupts its path. Its presence is more environmental than dominant.
strategy: Take advantage of how little it can reposition and punish it patiently. It is not a hard fight, but it can become a slow war of attrition if you drag it out for no reason.
